headline: Marathon Petroleum Expands Kazarian Role As Treasurer Over MPC And MPLX
summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) has appointed Kristina Kazarian as Treasurer, effective May 25. Kazarian’s role will cover both Marathon Petroleum and its master limited partnership, MPLX. The appointment expands her existing responsibilities in finance and investor relations at the company. Marathon Petroleum operates in the refining and midstream segments of the energy sector, areas that remain closely watched as fuel demand, capital spending, and logistics needs continue to evolve.
